q: Cau lénh nao duói day hién thi dim cao nhat cua mon ma hoc sinh nhan duoc:

opts.A: SELECT Student Name,Student Subject,Max(Marks)FROM Student Acads GROUP
opts.B: SELECT Student_Subject,FROM Student_Acads GROUP BY Student_Subject
opts.D: SELECT Student Subject,Max(Marks)FROM Student Acads WHERE Mac(Marks)

q: Ban sur dung cau lénh nao dé xóa bäng Employee ma khong ton tai nguyén cua hé thong va

opts.D: Khong thé dung cau lénh nao nhu trén.
